title: High School English II Teacher / Coach (2026-2027)
employer: Texas Leadership Public Schools — Cedar Hill
summary: Teach high school English II and serve in a coaching role. Provide students with educational activities that support intellectual, emotional, physical, and social growth, and coach an assigned sport.
required_credentials: Valid Texas teaching certificate (English / ELA 7-12), strongly preferred
ESL certification preferred for ELA teachers
responsibilities: Design and deliver TEKS-aligned English II lessons with differentiation.
Assess student learning with formal and informal testing.
Coach an assigned sport and sponsor approved extracurriculars.
Manage student behavior per the student code of conduct.
Maintain professional communication with parents and colleagues.
